function.name: create_client_calendar
function.description: Creates a new Google Calendar for a client, owned by the service account. Returns the calendar ID to store in the tenant record.

business_name.description: The client's business name for the calendar title

tenant_id.description: The tenant slug/ID for logging and reference

share_with_email.description: Optional email to share the calendar with (e.g. lez@callsaas.io or client's email)
